Uses of Class
com.gpudb.GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo

  • Packages that use GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo 
    Package Description
    com.gpudb  

    • Uses of GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo in com.gpudb

      Methods in com.gpudb that return GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.getClusterInfo()
      Gets the active cluster's information object.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setActiveHeadNodeUrl​(URL value)
      Set the active head node URL.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setHostManagerUrl​(URL value)
      Set the host manager URL.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setHostNames​(Set<String> value)
      Set the list of host names for all available machines (whether active or passive).
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setIsIntraClusterFailoverEnabled​(boolean value)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Set whether this cluster has intra-cluster failover enabled.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setIsPrimaryCluster​(boolean value)
      Set whether this cluster is the primary one.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setSystemProperties​(Map<String,​String> value)
      Set the system properties.
      GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo.setWorkerRankUrls​(List<URL> value)
      Set the worker rank URLs.
      Methods in com.gpudb that return types with arguments of type GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      List<GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo> GPUdbBase.getHARingInfo()
      Gets a copy of the list of ClusterAddressInfo objects that contain information about the Kinetica ring of clusters that this GPUdb object is connected to.
      List<GPUdbBase.ClusterAddressInfo> GPUdbBase.getHostAddresses()
